data.title: Pi Coin Price Prediction: Failed KYC? Broken Balances? Why This Mess Might Set Off a PI Supply Shock
data.description:
The Pi Coin price has plunged by 12% today, with its drop to $0.5525 coming after Israel launched airstrikes against Iran overnight.PI’s issues don’t end there, however, since the alt is also down by 16% in a fortnight and 53% in a month, while also suffering an 81.5% drop since reaching an ATH of $2
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/pi-coin-price-prediction-failed-kyc-broken-balances-why-this-mess-might-set-off-a-pi-supply-shock/

data.title: SharpLink Gaming fell 66.34% to $10.96
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: SharpLink Gaming, a US-listed company, fell 66.34% to $10.96, with a market value of $653 million. 
It was previously reported that SharpLink Gaming, a US-listed company called "ETH version of MicroStrategy", spent $463 million to buy 176,271 ETH.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 650 USDT with a 2.20% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 13, 2025, 14:21 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 650 USDT and is now trading at 649.609985 USDT, with a narrowed 2.20% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Israel-Iran tensions trigger over $7 million crypto betting volume spree on Polymarket
data.description:
The Israel-Iran conflict has triggered a wave of speculation across the crypto sector, with traders pouring millions into prediction markets. On Polymarket, a decentralized platform that allows users to wager on real-world outcomes, betting volume linked to the crisis has now exceeded $7 million across over 20 markets.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/israel-iran-tensions-trigger-over-7-million-crypto-betting-volume-spree-on-polymarket/

data.title: China shows no real signs of loosening rare earth monopoly
data.description:
Even as China signals it may issue more export permits for Europe and the United States, its tight grip on rare earth metals looks unlikely to loosen anytime soon, analysts warn. Three companies listed in Shenzhen announced this month that Beijing had approved their applications to ship magnets made with rare earths, elements essential for […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-not-loosening-rare-earth-monopoly/

data.title: SharpLink buys $463M in ETH, becomes largest public ETH holder
data.description:
While SharpLink has become the largest publicly traded holder of Ether globally, some entities, including the Ethereum Foundation and BlackRock, are still holding more ETH.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sharplink-largest-public-eth-holder-463m?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: The initial forecast for the US one-year inflation rate in June was 5.1%, while the expected rate was 6.4%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The initial forecast for the one-year inflation rate in the United States in June was 5.1%, the expected rate was 6.4%, and the previous value was 6.60%. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. June One-Year Inflation Rate Expected to Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, the preliminary estimate for the United States' one-year inflation rate in June is 5.1%. This figure is lower than the anticipated 6.4% and the previous value of 6.60%.

data.title: DOT for BTC? Polkadot Proposal Sparks Controversy Over Treasury Allocation
data.description:
The Polkadot community is debating a proposal to sell 500,000 DOT for Bitcoin in a $2 million diversification plan, revealing deep divisions over treasury strategy.

The post DOT for BTC? Polkadot Proposal Sparks Controversy Over Treasury Allocation first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/06/13/polkadot-eyes-bitcoin-reserve-treasury/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=polkadot-eyes-bitcoin-reserve-treasury

data.title: Invesco Galaxy Solana ETF Registers in Delaware
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that the Invesco Galaxy Solana ETF has been registered in Delaware. This development marks a significant step for the ETF, which focuses on the Solana blockchain platform. The registration is expected to pave the way for further advancements in the ETF's offerings and accessibility.

data.title: NVESCO GALAXY SOLANA ETF is incorporated in Delaware
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, INVESCO GALAXY SOLANA ETF has officially completed registration in Delaware

data.title: Crypto Investor Anthony Pompliano May Head Nasdaq Firm Planning Massive BTC Buy
data.description:
TL;DR Anthony Pompliano, a well-known pro-Bitcoin investor, is in talks to lead ProCapBTC, a publicly traded company aiming to raise $750 million to buy Bitcoin. The plan involves a merger with Columbus Circle Capital 1, backed by Cohen & Company. This move highlights another concrete step by traditional financial players toward adopting BTC as a. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/crypto-investor-anthony-pompliano-may-head-nasdaq-firm-planning-massive-btc-buy/

data.title: Markets reel as Trump says Iran got attacked by Israel for rejecting his nuclear deal
data.description:
President Donald Trump, speaking from the White House on Friday, said Iran was struck by Israel because it failed to accept the terms of a nuclear deal he personally offered them two months ago. “Two months ago I gave Iran a 60-day ultimatum to ‘make a deal. ’ They should have done it! Today is day […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-iran-attacked-rejecting-nuclear-deal/
